mapper.select:
SELECT n.id AS novelId, n.title AS title, s.code AS siteCode, s.color AS color, DATE_FORMAT(r.crawl_time, '%m-%d %H:%i') AS `time`,
r.`rank` r.view_count r.rec_count r.view_count
AS `value` FROM ranking_record r JOIN novel n ON r.novel_id = n.id JOIN site s ON r.site_id = s.id WHERE n.id IN
#{id}
AND r.crawl_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(3), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY r.crawl_time ASC

SELECT s.id AS siteId, s.code AS siteCode, s.name AS siteName, s.color AS color, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM novel n WHERE n.site_id = s.id) AS novelCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ranking_record r WHERE r.site_id = s.id) AS recordCount, (SELECT MAX(r.crawl_time) FROM ranking_record r WHERE r.site_id = s.id) AS lastCrawl FROM site s WHERE s.enabled = 1 ORDER BY s.sort_order

SELECT COALESCE(n.category, '未分类') AS category, COUNT(DISTINCT n.id) AS novelCount, ROUND(AVG(r.view_count)) AS avgViewCount FROM novel n LEFT JOIN v_latest_rank_snapshot r ON r.novel_id = n.id AND r.rn = 1 WHERE n.category IS NOT NULL AND n.category != '' GROUP BY n.category HAVING novelCount >= 1 ORDER BY novelCount DESC LIMIT 20
